headline: A Look At Quest Diagnostics (DGX) Valuation As Investors Reassess The Stock Without A Clear News Catalyst
summary: With no specific news event driving headlines today, Quest Diagnostics (DGX) is drawing attention as investors consider its current share price of US$197.16 in relation to recent returns and the company’s role in US diagnostic testing services. See our latest analysis for Quest Diagnostics. Recent trading reflects mixed momentum, with a 0.84% 1 day share price return and a 12.35% 90 day share price return, alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 18.69% and a 5 year total shareholder...
